verdict.moderator_pairing_notes: The moderator correctly identified a consensus in Round 1 (all agents listed Peru as a top candidate) and terminated the process. No pairings were necessary.
verdict.judge_synthesis_notes: The judge correctly identified Peru as the consensus choice. The reasoning relied primarily on the frequency of mentions (soft evidence) rather than explicitly leveraging the hard constraints identified by the regulatory agent (yellow center line, right-hand traffic) or the meta agent (construction style). While the conclusion is correct, the synthesis could have been stronger by explicitly weighting the regulatory evidence higher.
